title: Strukturerad Senior Systemutvecklare
description:
Är du en strukturerad och lösningsorieterad senior systemutvecklare som gillar att röra sig i gränslandet mellan lösningsarkitektur och utveckling? Då är detta något för dig.
  
Uppdraget innefattar vidareutveckling, nyutveckling och införande av IT-lösning inom Verkställighet.
  
Till det här uppdraget söker vi en senior utvecklare som med vana rör sig i gränslandet mellan lösningsarkitektur och utveckling och är bekväm med både rollen som utvecklingsledare (lead developer) och utvecklare. I arbetet ingår både att ta fram lösningar i samråd med applikationernas lösningsarkitekter samt att arbeta med systemutveckling och implementera funktionalitet baserad på fastställda krav. Utveckling av system sker med hänsyn till den planerade lösningens hela livscykel.
  
Konsulten kommer vara förvaltningsansvarig med 3rd line support ca 1ggr/veckan och detta arbete sker inne på kontoret.
  
Som systemutvecklare i leveransområdet Verkställa kommer du
  
* Utveckla och implementera mjukvarulösningar enligt krav, design och arkitektur
* Genomföra felsökning, isolera och korrigera mjukvarufel.
* Utgöra stöd och support till drift och förvaltning av mjukvarulösningar.
* Dokumenterar implementerad funktionalitet.


Uppdraget innefattar arbete inom
  
* Språk/plattform: Java (JDK11)/JavaEE8 eller senare
* Integration: XML/XSD, JSON/JSONSchema, SOAP, REST, JMS
* Byggstöd: Maven och Jenkins
* Versionshantering: Git
* Versionshantering –databas: Liquibase
* Applikationsserver: Weblogic
* Utvecklingsverktyg: IntelliJ för Java-utveckling
* Testramverk: JBehave, Selenium, Cypress, JMeter
* Driftmiljö: Redhat Linux
* Databas: Oracle
* Frontend: Angular


Krav
  
Minst 5 års arbetserfarenhet av java-baserad backend-utveckling baserad på JavaEE under de senaste 10 åren.
  
Minst 1 års arbetserfarenhet av framgångsrik testbaserad utveckling under de senaste 6 åren.
  
Minst 2 års arbetserfarenhet av JPA och/eller JMS under de senaste 5 åren.
  
Minst 3 års arbetserfarenhet av DB/Liquibase under de senaste 5 åren
  
Minst 3 års arbetserfarenhet av Web Logic Server.
  
Minst 3 års arbetserfarenhet av Angular.
  
Minst 5 års arbetserfarenhet som utvecklare inom en stor myndighet.
  
  

Personliga egenskaper
  
Noggrann, analytisk och ifrågasättande
  
Trivas med att arbeta tätt tillsammans med teamet och beställare
  
Ansvarstagande, tekniskt kreativ samt ha förmåga att kommunicera och skapa goda relationer med kollegor både i och utanför teamet
  
Drivas av att dela med sig av sina kunskaper och verka för projektets bästa
  
  

**Arbete hemifrån:** Delvis
  
För uppdraget finns det möjlighet att arbeta delvis på distans, minst 2 dagar i veckan måste arbetet utgå ifrån av KFM angivet kontor och placeringsort, beroende på uppdragets karaktär. Detta medför att konsultbolaget ansvarar för att tillhandahålla en ändamålsenlig arbetsplats för konsulten och att konsultbolaget tar ansvar för den fysiska arbetsmiljön. Kunden tillhandahåller arbetsdator och verktyg för distansarbete (VPN).
  
All tillgång till produktionsmiljö sker från kundens kontor, vilket kan vara valfritt i landet. Konsulten kommer vara förvaltningsansvarig för omnämnda system ca 1ggr/veckan och detta arbete sker inne på kontoret.
  
**Placeringsort:** Sundbyberg
  
Introduktion och arbete utgår ifrån placeringsortens KFM-kontor.
  
Kan detta vara ett uppdrag som passar dig?
  
Sök redan i dag eller kontakta oss så berättar vi gärna mer. Vi behöver en ansökan inkluderat CV och personligt brev på svenska som matchar vår kunds krav. Kunden kan fatta beslut tidigare än sista ansökningsdatum, urval och intervjuer sker löpande. NXT Interim och NXT Rekrytering är ett nischat och innovativt företag som är verksamma inom konsult och rekryteringsbranschen.
  
Vi är verksamma inom HR, IT, Ekonomi, Sälj och Marknad och har över 20 års erfarenhet i branschen. Vi erbjuder våra konsulter bl.a sjukförsäkring, remote-arbetsplatser och flera andra förmåner som förgyller deras vardag. Vid anställning tillämpar vi kollektivavtal.

title: Utvecklare bibliotek
description:
*Biblioteksutveckling arbetar strategiskt med att dela kunskap, främja samverkan och möjliggöra utveckling för folkbiblioteken i Jönköpings län. Uppdraget utgår från Bibliotekslagen och Biblioteksplan Region Jönköpings län.*  

*Vi söker en utvecklare som vill bidra till att kommunicera och stärka bibliotekens roll och verksamhet, där betydelsen för det demokratiska samhällets utveckling är särskilt aktuell.*

### **Rollen som utvecklare bibliotek**


I det regionala utvecklingsuppdraget arbetar du för att länets invånare ska erbjudas en relevant och jämlik biblioteksverksamhet av hög kvalitet. Du arbetar tillsammans med kollegor och i nära samverkan och dialog med folkbibliotekens personal och andra samverkansparter.  

  

Som utvecklare tar du initiativ till, driver och handleder projekt och processer som främjar samarbete och möter folkbibliotekens utvecklingsbehov. Du omvärldsbevakar, följer upp, analyserar och utvärderar insatser. Du samordnar fortbildningstillfällen för folkbibliotekens personal samt ansvarar för Biblioteksutvecklings webbplats och nyhetsbrev. I tjänsten ingår också allmänna administrativa uppgifter.  

Vi erbjuder en tillsvidareanställning med start i augusti, eller enligt överenskommelse, med placering i Jönköping och med resor både inom och utanför länet, där B-körkort är nödvändigt.

### **Din blivande arbetsplats**


Biblioteksutveckling är en del i Kulturutveckling inom Regional utveckling och består av enhetschef och fyra utvecklare. Vi arbetar med biblioteksutveckling på strategisk nivå, där den primära målgruppen är personalen på folkbiblioteken i Jönköpings län. Uppdraget utgår från Bibliotekslagen och Biblioteksplan Region Jönköpings län 2026-2029, med vår verksamhetsidé dela kunskap, främja samverkan och möjliggöra utveckling. Arbetet sker i samverkan och samspel med det omgivande samhället och i nära dialog med länets folkbibliotek och andra aktörer.

### **Din profil**


Vi söker dig som har en akademisk examen inom biblioteks- och informationsvetenskap, samhällsvetenskap eller annat område som har relevans för de aktuella arbetsuppgifterna. Du är van att undersöka och analysera samt att driva processer tillsammans med andra. Du arbetar självständigt och strukturerat, anpassar dig utifrån olika behov och hittar lösningar. Du har goda kunskaper i digitala verktyg för planering, samarbete, dokumenthantering och kommunikation. Vi söker dig som är mycket skicklig på att kommunicera i tal och skrift och som trivs i sammanhang där förmågan att förklara, presentera och inspirera är viktig.  

  

Arbetet passar dig som är nyfiken, kommunikativ och har en stark vilja att utvecklas med stöd i aktuell forskning. Du trivs med att reflektera över ditt arbete och ser värdet i att skapa och underhålla kontakter. Vi lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.

### **Vårt erbjudande till dig**


Vi erbjuder dig ett stimulerande arbete i en kreativ och lärande utvecklingsverksamhet. Pågående utvecklingsprocesser där du bidrar med just din kompetens handlar bland annat om bibliotekens demokratiska uppdrag, digital kompetens och digital delaktighet, språk- och läsfrämjande och prioriterade grupper.  

  

Som medarbetare hos oss inom Region Jönköpings län får du tillgång till våra anställningsförmåner. En del av dem ökar din grundtrygghet, andra sätter lite guldkant på vardagen. Läs mer om våra förmåner här: Förmåner, Region Jönköpings län

### **Har du frågor om tjänsten?**


Vill du veta mer kring tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Johanna Billvén på: johanna.billven@rjl.se. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.

### **Vår rekryteringsprocess**


Sista ansökningsdag är den 12 april. Välkommen med din ansökan.  

Läs mer om Region Jönköpings läns rekryteringsprocess på vår hemsida: Vår rekryteringsprocess, Region Jönköpings län

title: Senior Platform Developers (iOS & Android)
description:
March 24, 2026
Hybrid
Sweden
Posted 12 hours ago
We are hiring **Senior Platform Developers (iOS & Android)**for the position based in **Stockholm (Hybrid – 2–3 days onsite per week).**


**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or equivalent professional experience.


**Job Summary:**



We are seeking two experienced **Senior Platform Developers** one specializing in iOS and one in Android focuses on building the foundational architecture that empowers mobile feature teams, rather than developing end-user features directly. You will work closely with internal stakeholders to create scalable platform solutions, enhance developer experience, and establish consistent architectural standards across mobile ecosystems. The ideal candidate is passionate about platform engineering, developer tooling, and enabling high-performing teams through robust infrastructure.


**Required Experience/Competences:**


* **7+ years** of experience in **Mobile development** or **platform engineering** roles.
* Strong expertise in: **iOS: Swift** and **Android: Kotlin / Kotlin Multiplatform**
* Strong understanding of **mobile architecture** patterns and state management approaches.
* Hands-on experience with **CI/CD pipelines**, developer tooling, and workflow optimization.
* Familiarity with scalable architecture design and cross-team platform enablement.
* Experience implementing security models such as **RBAC** is a plus.


**Soft Skills:**


* Strong problem-solving and system design skills.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills across cross-functional teams.
* Passion for improving developer productivity and experience.
* Ability to work independently while driving platform-wide initiatives.
* Structured, detail-oriented, and proactive mindset.
### **Job Features**


Job Category Mobile app development

title: Software Engineer, Maps Developer Experience Team Lead
description:
A job at Apple is unlike any other you’ve had. You’ll be challenged. You’ll be inspired. And you’ll be proud.  

  

The Apple Maps team is building the internal platform that powers data at scale. Join our Developer Experience team to architect tools that automate workflows, integrate diverse technologies, and solve tomorrow's challenges today.  

  

**Description**  

We are looking for a driven and passionate Software Engineer to join our team providing leadership in designing solutions to keep up with the rapid pace of innovation. You will work closely with engineering, QA, and project managers to deliver cutting edge automation to solve business use cases, enhance developer efficiency, and to produce high quality products. You will serve as the team lead and primary subject matter expert, providing strategic guidance and cross-functional support to enable effective delivery across teams.  

  

Your primary responsibility will be to lead full-stack development of innovative solutions on the Unified Build platform, directly impacting productivity for hundreds of engineers across thousands of projects. You'll also own critical service migrations and develop automation infrastructure that scales impact across the organization.  

  

You will need to combine deep technical expertise in JVM build systems, dependency management, and build language architecture with a relentless focus on performance optimization, developer experience, and scalability to transform build complexity into simplicity.  

  

You will need to operate effectively in a fast-paced, globally distributed environment, balancing software development and operational support while managing multiple concurrent priorities across complex infrastructure.  

  

You will need to exhibit strong leadership skills and intuition to navigate ambiguity, align stakeholders, and drive informed decisions that move the team and organization forward.","responsibilities":"Lead and mentor a small team of engineers, fostering a collaborative and high-performing team culture.  

Contribute directly as an independent contributor alongside your team.  

Shape the technical vision and roadmap for Developer Experience initiatives, identifying opportunities to reduce friction, improve tooling, and systematically increase developer velocity across the organization.  

Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering and infrastructure partners across Apple to accelerate delivery of Maps features.  

  

**Preferred Qualifications**  

Proficient in Java/Scala/Kotlin and scripting languages (Python, Go, Bash)  

Proficient in one or more frontend frameworks like React (preferred), Angular, Vue or equivalent.  

Experience working with GenAI Coding Assistants.  

Experience with AI/ML systems, designing, building, and integrating Machine Learning to solve business problems.  

Experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).  

Familiarity with Infrastructure-as-Code and CI/CD practices.  

Familiarity with Build Languages (Gradle, Maven, SBT, Make, xcode) and Package Managers.  

Familiarity with ML Infrastructure, such as model serving, inference optimizations, and training evaluations.  

Strong operational skills and experience supporting Production Services and Infrastructure at scale.  

Experience building solutions by integrating with RESTful web services or GraphQL APIs.  

Ability to communicate effectively, work independently yet collaboratively, with a distributed team.  

Strong attention to detail and ability to learn new technologies.  

  

**Minimum Qualifications**  

Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science or similar technical degree  

5+ years of full stack development experiencing designing and building complex, highly available, distributed systems.  

Proven track record of architecting, developing, releasing, and supporting critically important software components.  

Experience leading or mentoring a team of engineers.  

Proficiency in Java or JVM languages, JavaScript and/or TypeScript.  

  

At Apple, we’re not all the same. And that’s our greatest strength. We draw on the differences in who we are, what we’ve experienced, and how we think. Because to create products that serve everyone, we believe in including everyone. Therefore, we are committed to treating all applicants fairly and equally. We will work with applicants to make any reasonable accommodations.

title: Senior Java-utvecklare inom Open Banking till Handelsbanken
description:
#### **OM JOBBET**


Handelsbanken söker en senior Java-utvecklare för ett uppdrag inom Open Banking. Du kommer att arbeta med utveckling och förvaltning av APIer kopplade till betaltjänstregelverket (PSD2/PSR), vilket innebär både vidareutveckling av befintliga lösningar och utveckling för nya regulatoriska krav under 2026-2027. Uppdraget startar i april och löper till slutet av juli 2026.


#### **OM FÖRETAGET**


Handelsbanken är en av Sveriges ledande banker med stark närvaro i Norden och Storbritannien. Banken är känd för sin decentraliserade struktur och fokus på långsiktiga kundrelationer.


#### **ARBETSUPPGIFTER**


Som senior Java-utvecklare kommer du att vara en viktig del av teamet som arbetar med Open Banking-lösningar. Dina huvudsakliga arbetsområden inkluderar:


Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:


* Utveckling och förvaltning av REST APIer inom Open Banking
* Implementera nya funktioner och krav enligt betaltjänstregelverket (PSD2/PSR)
* Arbeta med API-dokumentation enligt OpenAPI-standard
* Utveckla enhetstester och testautomatisering med JUnit och Mockito
* Arbeta i CI/CD-pipeline med TeamCity
* Hantera JSON och HTTP-protokoll i integrationslösningar
* Samarbeta i ett agilt team med erfarna utvecklare


#### **ERFARENHETER OCH EGENSKAPER**


**Krav:**


* Dokumenterad erfarenhet från Java-utveckling (backend) i Handelsbanken
* Kunskap om Minerva-ramverket
* Goda kunskaper i Java 11 eller nyare
* God kunskap inom REST API-utveckling och API-dokumentation (OpenAPI)
* Erfarenhet av enhetstester och testautomatisering (JUnit, Mockito)
* Erfarenhet av TeamCity eller liknande CI/CD-pipeline verktyg
* Erfarenhet av hantering av JSON och HTTP-protokoll
* 6-10 års erfarenhet som konsult inom relevant område


**Personliga egenskaper:**


* Hög grad av självständighet och ansvarstagande
* Förmåga att ta huvudansvar för tilldelade arbetsuppgifter
* Strukturerad och noggrann i ditt arbete
* God kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska
* Kan vara en förebild för mer juniora kollegor


#### **ÖVRIGT**


**Start:** 13 april 2026

**Omfattning:** Heltid (100%)

**Plats:** Kundens kontor i Stockholm


#### **TID FÖR ANSÖKAN**



Låter detta som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi intervjuar löpande!


#### **OM D-SOURCE**


*Your source to IT*  

D-Source är ett modernt konsultbolag med bredden mellan helpdesk, infrastruktur och Tech. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att förstå kunders IT-behov! Tveka inte att höra av dig om du är intresserad av att ta reda på mer.



Vad kan vi göra för dig och vad kan vi göra tillsammans?


#### **INGET JOBB FÖR DIG?**



Lugnt! Du kan alltid registrera dig förutsättningslöst på D-Source jobbsida genom att Connecta med oss. Då hamnar du i vår kandidatdatabas och får koll på våra kommande aktuella tjänster.

title: Senior utvecklare som vill jobba i molnet!
description:
*”Det jag uppskattar mest är att integration hos oss inte är ett sidospår, utan en strategisk del av lösningen. Jag får jobba nära både verksamhet och teknik, lösa verkliga problem och bygga lösningar som håller över tid. Samtidigt är det ett team där man vågar testa nytt, bolla idéer och där ingen sitter på höga hästar, samtidigt som vi har väldigt kul på vägen.”* - Så här beskriver en av våra utvecklare vardagen hos oss på Fellowmind.


Vi på Fellowmind är en ledande Microsoft‑partner med ett brett erbjudande inom Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Azure, Cloud och Modern Workplace. Nu söker vi en erfarenutvecklare till vårt team antingen i Jönköping eller Göteborg som vill vara med och bygga smarta, hållbara lösningar i molnet.

**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Hos oss kliver du in i ett sammanhang där integration är en nyckel för att skapa ordning, automatisering och långsiktig hållbarhet i kundernas IT‑landskap. Vi arbetar med komplexa miljöer där integrationer möjliggör skalbara flöden, minskar beroenden och skapar verkligt affärsvärde.


Teamet präglas av prestigelöshet, nyfikenhet och en vilja att göra saker ordentligt, men inte krångligare än nödvändigt. AI är en naturlig del av både vår vardag och våra lösningar, och du får goda möjligheter att vara med och utveckla detta vidare i din roll hos oss.


Att jobba som konsult hos oss innebär att du får jobba brett och varierat, och du kommer arbeta nära både kundens verksamhet och dina härliga kollegor.

**Det här kommer du bland annat att göra:**

* Designa, utveckla och vidareutveckla integrationslösningar i Azure
* Arbeta i komplexa miljöer där flera system och plattformar samverkar
* Delta i allt från förstudier till implementation och vidareutveckling
* Fungera som rådgivare och hjälpa kunder att fatta kloka tekniska beslut

**Vi tror att du är:**

* En erfaren utvecklare med bakgrund som C#‑utvecklare
* Van vid att arbeta i Azure eller liknande molnplattform
* Trygg i kundnära roller och van att omsätta verksamhetsbehov till teknik
* Nyfiken på ny teknik och lösningar som förenklar och förbättrar
* Intresserad av – eller har erfarenhet av – AI‑baserade lösningar är meriterande.


Som person är du initiativtagande, kommunikativ och prestigelös. Du tycker om att samarbeta, vågar utmana befintliga arbetssätt och drivs av att skapa hållbara lösningar tillsammans med andra. Du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.

**Därför sticker vi på Fellowmind ut**
--------------------------------------

* Hos oss får du en arbetsplats där utveckling aldrig stannar, där kulturen är personlig och inkluderande – och där vi alltid jobbar **Better together**, **Always personal**, **Act with courage** och **Serious about fun**.
* Fellowmind är inte bara en av Microsofts viktigaste partners i Europa – vi är Microsoft EMEA Channel Partner of the Year 2025. Priset delades ut på Ignite i San Francisco och är ett erkännande för vårt innovationsdriv, vår AI-strategi och vårt nära samarbete med Microsofts produktteam.
* Vi är med i Microsofts exklusiva Inner Circle – den yttersta procenten av partners globalt – och har tillgång till de senaste teknologierna, insikterna och möjligheten att påverka Microsofts utveckling.
* Vi levererar inte bara integrationslösningar – utan vi bygger plattformsprojekt där hela Microsofts ekosystem är i spel, och där du får vara med och forma framtidens digitala affärer.

**Om Fellowmind**
-----------------


Fellowmind är en europeisk marknadsledare inom digital transformation. Vi kombinerar djup branschkunskap och personlig vägledning med Microsofts molntjänster för hela affärsplattformen, från ERP, molninfrastruktur, dataanalys och AI, till CRM, intranät och Modern Workplace. Fellowmind är ett internationellt bolag med över 2000 medarbetare och har kontor i Nederländerna, Danmark, Finland, Polen och Sverige. Läs mer på www.fellowmind.se

**Det praktiska**

**Start:** Så snart som möjligt, med hänsyn till uppsägningstid  

**Omfattning:** Heltid, med flexibel arbetsvardag och möjlighet till hybridarbete  

**Placering:** Jönköping & Göteborg


Har du frågor om rollen? Kontakta **Mathias Rehnström** på +46 70-260 39 74.  

Frågor om rekryteringsprocessen? Hör av dig till **Philip Arcangioli** på philip.arcangioli@fellowmind.se

title: Senior Java Developer (Azure)
description:
**About us**  

At **Techrytera AB**, recruitment starts with you. We are a staffing and recruitment company with deep expertise and a clear focus on IT and Engineering. With our industry knowledge and close dialogue with both candidates and clients, we create precise matches where the right skills meet the right needs.


We believe that a truly great match is not just about a job description – it’s about your experience, your potential, and what you genuinely want to develop in. That’s why we always focus on the individual. By understanding your background, motivations, and ambitions, we can connect you with assignments and roles at our clients where you have the right conditions to grow and make an impact.


Our goal is to build long-term and meaningful collaborations – for both you as a candidate and for our clients.

 **Job Description**  

  

Uppdragsbeskrivning


We are looking for a Senior Java Developer with Azure experience for our client.


﻿

  

They are, in-house, building a financial product to support payments for claims in Volvo (both warranty and service contract claims).


﻿

  

There is an existing module in the solution UCHP – Unified Claim Handling Process – that has been supporting claim payments. This functionality is now being replaced by a new product called UFF (UCHP Financial Flow).


﻿

  

The UFF application is a new finance-focused component carved out of the UCHP monolith to meet updated legal requirements across multiple markets. It receives claim cost data for items ready for payment, calculates dealer payouts, generates payment and specification documents, and integrates with external systems (Master Finance/SAP, document archiving, and the EDI integration platform). The solution supports restartable processing, resend capabilities, document download APIs, and status publication, while maintaining audit-friendly storage of transmitted payloads and documents.


﻿

  

At the start of 2026, the first EDI markets were onboarded to UFF. The product roadmap for this year includes support for several additional EDI markets. In addition, the roadmap also includes new functionality required for a number of markets as part of the Elvira project (Master Finance 2.0) rollout plan. Next in line is support for the new information model in 2027 (also part of Master Finance 2.0).


﻿

 **Technology used:**

* Java Spring Boot microservices with a clear hexagonal architecture
* Event-driven design
* Azure services such as Event Hub, Storage, and Cosmos DB
* MQ integration secured with mutual TLS
* DevSecOps via Azure Pipelines
* Security tooling: Sonar, SCA, SAST, DAST
* Containerized with Docker and deployed on Azure Red Hat OpenShift
* Monitoring using Splunk


﻿

 **Required skills (1 = low, 2 medium, 3 high level of skill)**


﻿

  

Microservice design, 2


Java Spring boot, 3


Liquibase, 1


Azure Devops CI/CD pipeline, 3


NoSQL like Mongo db or cosmos db, 2


Azure cloud competence, 1


Websphere MQ, 1


Container service like openshift, 2


Docker, 1


Terraform, 1


Kafka or similar streaming solution, 1  

  

**Application**


When you apply through **Techrytera AB**, you’re not just applying for a job – you’re starting a dialogue about your career path. We want to get to know you, your experience, and your ambitions so that we can match you with the right opportunities at our clients.


Does this sound interesting? Submit your application or get in touch with us to learn more. We look forward to discovering the next step in your career together with you.

title: Systemutvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 9 års erfarenhet
* Mycket hög kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av C# och ramverket .Net. minst 8 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Optimizely Content Delivery API (Headless). minst 2 år
* Mycket hög kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av design, utveckling och säkerhet inom REST API:er. minst 8 år
* Mycket hög kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Entity Framework. minst 8 år
* Hög kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med versionshantering i Git. minst 4 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Azure Devops server i form av att kunna bygga release pipeline i YAML. minst 2 år
* Hög kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av design och arkitektur av it-lösningar samt att leda andra systemutvecklare. minst 4 år
* God förmåga att kommunicera muntligt och skriftligt på svenska med andra personer, såväl verksamhetens användare som it-specialister, god samarbetsförmåga samt förmåga att arbeta i och anpassa sig till en grupp.

  

**Meriterande**  

* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Solr sökmotor. minst 2 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Messaging/köbaserade integrationer, exempelvis ActiveMQ. minst 2 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av säker utveckling och Open Web Application Security Project (OWASP). minst 2 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av Structured Query Language (SQL) samt datamodellering. minst 4 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet med mikrotjänster och dess arkitektur. minst 2 år
* Kompetens inom och arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med systemutveckling inom offentlig sektor. minst 2 år

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 13-04-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Full Stack Developer – AI Enablement and Tooling
description:
**About us**


Soundtrack is a B2B scale-up company providing music streaming services to more than 80,000 businesses in over 70 countries, from the café round the corner to bigger brands like Joe & The Juice, Toni & Guy and TAG Heuer.


The company consists of 150+ talented, motivated and humble employees. We believe in product-led growth, where the product is the primary driver of customer acquisition, conversion and expansion. Our headquarters are located in central Stockholm (Odenplan).


You can check out the How it works page to learn more about our product or download our app and sign up for a free trial to get a first hand experience.

**The Role**


We're looking for a Full Stack Developer to join Soundtrack. Formally, you’ll be part of the Music Experience team — which has strong AI and machine learning expertise — but your day-to-day work will take place together with other parts of the organisation.


You will act as an internal consultant, embedded with our Growth, Marketing and Revenue Operations teams to uncover untapped opportunities. Your goal is to identify where AI can move the needle, consult on the best path forward, and then build the tools to make it happen.


The role requires you to fluently communicate across different departments and expertises and quickly be able to grasp business and user problems.


The position is based in Stockholm and offers a unique mix of technical hands-on work and cross-functional collaboration.

**Responsibilities**

* Build and maintain integrations between AI services and tools such as Dato, Google Analytics.
* Design and implement APIs and backend components that connect AI systems with internal tools.
* Work closely with technical and non-technical users to understand their workflows and pain points.
* Test, iterate and refine solutions to ensure real impact and usability.
* Share knowledge and contribute to Soundtrack’s overall AI enablement strategy.

**About You**


Just like us, you love music. You’re curious, collaborative and motivated by creating impact. You enjoy talking to people, understanding how they work, and building tools that make their jobs easier. You’re not someone who sits in a corner and codes in isolation — you communicate, iterate and get things done.


You probably describe yourself as:

* Communicative and easy to work with
* Self-driven and proactive – you take initiative and deliver results
* Adaptable and comfortable in a changing environment
* Pragmatic and methodical in your approach
* Curious and eager to learn new technologies

**Requirements**


You should feel comfortable working across the stack — writing React components on the frontend and Python-based APIs on the backend.

* Professional experience as a Full Stack Developer (2 years or more), with hands-on work in both frontend and backend
* Proficiency in Python and JavaScript/TypeScript (React) or similar frameworks
* Experience building and integrating APIs
* Comfortable with Git and modern development tools
* Strong communication skills and ability to translate user needs into technical solutions

**Beneficial Requirements**

* Experience integrating AI/LLM systems (e.g. ADK, LangChain, Vertex AI etc.)
* Understanding of prompt engineering and model tuning
* Experience with cloud or container-based deployments (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Interest in music, music tech or AI-driven applications
* Experience with CI/CD workflows

**Employee Benefits**

* Hybrid role based in Stockholm – you’ll need to work from our Stockholm office on a regular basis while also having flexibility to work from home when suitable
* Generous pension plan
* Yearly budget for health, wellness and personal development
* Laptop and mobile phone of your choice with included cellular subscription
* Regular social activities such as team events, meetups, after works and off-sites
* Daily breakfast served at the office


At Soundtrack, we believe that diversity fuels creativity and innovation.


We're committed to building a team that reflects a variety of backgrounds, perspectives and experiences.


We welcome applications from individuals of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, abilities, religions, sexual orientations and identities.


We reserve the right to close this vacancy early if we identify a suitable candidate.


To ensure consideration, we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible.


Please note that we only accept applications submitted via our career page and do not accept applications by e-mail.

title: R&D Engineer - Embedded Software developer
description:
**Location:**

Ludvika, Dalarna County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0053164
**Date Posted:**

2025-02-26
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity**

Join Hitachi Energy and be part of a team that’s advancing a sustainable energy future for all. You’ll work on impactful projects that power homes, schools, hospitals, and factories, while collaborating with a diverse group of talented engineers. Our innovative High Voltage Direct Current (HVDC) technology, including the MACH™ system, revolutionizes electricity transmission over long distances. As a member of our R&D team, you’ll contribute to the development of next-generation systems and maintain existing ones, all within a supportive and collaborative environment. Bring your passion and energy to a global team that values diversity and innovation.


**How you’ll make an impact**

* Engage in the development and maintenance of wide range of embedded systems (ARM, DSP, SoC...), from pre-study and design to tests and integration.
* Develop high-quality software modules within specified timelines and efficiently maintain them, including implementing enhancements and bug fixes.
* Create specifications and documentation for software components to ensure clarity and consistency.
* Maintain high code quality through code reviews, test automation, and adherence to up-to-date software development processes.
* Work closely with internal and external customers in agile, cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions.
* Uphold Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity by taking responsibility for your actions and showing care for your colleagues and the business.

**Your background**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Embedded Systems, Computer Science, Electronics, or Electrical Engineering.
* Solid experience in embedded software development using C/C++ and C#, with expertise in real-time/control applications and RTOS.
* Understanding of transmission systems, AC/DC conversion, and distributed digital control.
* Understanding of SW-SW and SW-HW Integration, as the systems involve software, hardware and FPGA components.
* Experience in debugging and root cause analysis.
* Proficient in Business English.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**

Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today.


Recruiting Manager Somayeh Sarikhani, sonia.sarikhani@hitachienergy.com will be happy to answer your questions regarding this position.


Union representatives - Sveriges Ingenjörer; Mikael Hjort, +46 107-38 25 73; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107-38 70 43; Unionen: Fredrik Holmgren, +46 107-38 21 85. All other questions can be directed to Lead Recruiter, Agata Koper, agata.koper@hitachienergy.com .


**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Frontend Developer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Front-end Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is frontend using JavaScript and TypeScript, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust frontend applications, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a teams of different sizes.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Frontend Engineer with at least 8+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* At least 8+ years of experience using TypeScript and Javascript.
* Solid skills in modern libraries and frameworks such as Next.js, React, Vue.js, Svelte, Node, NestJS, Angular, Express.js, Solid, React Native.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).
* Ability to start immidiately.


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Software Engineer - Graduate - Sweden
description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.
   

  

**Meet the Team**
 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Proficiency in C/C++ with strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.
* A recent Graduate with relevant Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in STEM degrees.
* Fluent English Proficiency
* Ability to live and work in Sweden with no additional VISA or relocation sponsorship from Cisco.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.
* Critically reviews AI-generated code before using it.
* Steers AI effectively via context and prompt design.
* Uses AI responsibly to accelerate development.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Junior Product Developer to H&M
description:
**Job Description**

 Job Description
   

  





*Are you passionate about fashion, trends and the idea of creating an assortment that inspire and elevate the everyday wardrobe?*




*We are now looking for a curious and motivated Junior Product Developer to join our team at H&M. If you thrive in a fast paced and creative environment and want to grow your skills in product development, this is an opportunity to contribute to a global assortment that our customers love.*




*We are currently hiring for both temporary and permanent positions*




**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
  

 As a Junior Product Developer you will play an important role in the dynamic and multifaceted process of developing products for collections sold in all our markets around the world.
   

  





 Together with a close and collaborative accessories team, you will work on identifying and developing the right assortment based on upcoming trends, customer needs and commercial insights. Your main responsibility will be to support the Product Developer in creating a relevant and attractive offer for our customers, always guided by our strategy and targets.
   

  





 You will work closely with a Product Manager, Designers, Planners and other key functions throughout the development process. You will be an important link between teams, driving the process forward and ensuring smooth coordination from idea to final product.
   

  





 In this role, you will be part of the daily operational work, managing several parallel tasks. You will be involved in everything from sample handling to supporting the development of accessories that meet customer expectations and strengthen our commercial potential.
   

  





  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**
  

 We are looking for people with
   

  




* At least one year of experience in product development or buying in fashion
* Relevant education in fashion, buying or product development
* A commercial mindset with a strong drive to contribute to business growth
* A deep understanding of the womenswear customer and a sharp eye for fashion and trends
* A structured and organised way of working, with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously
* A collaborative and communicative approach, thriving in a cross functional environment with a humble and hands on attitude
* A curious mindset and eagerness to continuously learn and develop
* Strong commercial thinking, with the ability to spot opportunities for growth and profitability
* A passion for finding smarter ways of working and improving everyday tasks



  

  





**WHO WE ARE​**
  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US** 
  

  

 Additional information:
   

  

 We are currently hiring for both temporary and permanent positions. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





  

  





**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Backend Software Engineer
description:
We at Umain are looking for
 **Senior Backend Engineers** 
 with a genuine enthusiasm for building robust solutions that power digital experiences — engineers ready to bring passion, creativity, and dedication with them.
   

  

 The role is broad but centered on backend technologies, offering the opportunity to work on a variety of projects for both Swedish and international companies.
   

  

 We work with many different tech stacks, but most of our projects are written in
 **Kotlin, Go, or TypeScript** 
 . Our approach is to use the tools best suited for each project, ensuring our teams are not locked into a single stack.
   

  

**We Have a Proven Track Record**
* 400M+ total app downloads
* 50M+ monthly active users
* Backends handling tens of thousands of requests per second
* Globally recognized, multi-market applications


 If working at scale with technology that truly makes an impact excites you, we believe you'll be a great fit at Umain.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to work on a range of diverse and unique projects that explore and push the boundaries of what's possible.
* A fun and fair work environment where you have the opportunity to expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams, participating in agile teams, being an important player in a highly ambitious setting.


 As a Senior Backend Developer at Umain, your role will involve:
   

  

* Building high-performance backend systems using modern languages like Go, NodeJS, Python, and Kotlin to power innovative experiences
* Using modern backend frameworks such as Fiber, Ktor, Express and FastAPI to create robust solutions.
* Designing and implementing cloud-native solutions across AWS, GCP and Azure, using Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform) for resource management
* Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with containerized deployments and scaling strategies
* Developing robust data models and database architectures to support application requirements
* Participating in projects & teams alongside some of the largest and most forward-thinking brands on the planet


**Who You Are**
* You're a developer with a passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving.
* You're eager to learn, grow, and take on new challenges.
* You value collaboration, diversity, and the opportunity to make a significant impact.
* You believe in the power of technology to shape the future.


 Why Umain?
   

  

**Career Framework**
 We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Your growth and success are as important to us as they are to you. Together with your coach, you will build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

**Work-Life Balance**
 At Umain, diversity is our strength. We understand that life doesn’t pause when you walk into the office. That's why we've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance. We welcome team members from all walks of life, recognizing the richness that different backgrounds, ages, and life stages bring to our team. We're committed to supporting each other, encouraging a healthy work-life balance that respects your needs, whether it's taking care of your family, your pets, or yourself.
   

  

**Innovations And Learning**
 Technology is always evolving, bringing new challenges and opportunities for collaboration and learning. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more to tackle these challenges head-on, sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

**Skills Over Degrees**
 We’re more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Umain. Here, you’ll find opportunities to grow, learn, and excel in your career, regardless of your educational background. If you have the ambition and commitment to succeed, we have the environment and resources to support your journey.
   

  

**Are you ready to SHAPE, SHIP, and SCALE with us?**
 If you're a developer who thrives on innovation, values a supportive and inclusive workplace, and is eager to make a tangible impact on the future, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something awesome together.
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our* 
 internal policies
 *. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Product Developer
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 In this role as a Product Developer, you’ll play an important part in shaping the H&M assortment. You will define and execute both short‑ and long‑term strategies for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment goals. Leveraging your fashion intelligence, salesmanship and commercial insight, you’ll drive seasonal keys and act on emerging trends. You will continuously refine our product and component strategy to drive growth and profitability.
   

  





 In this position you will drive initiatives forward, ensuring seamless execution and effective cross‑team collaboration in a fast‑paced environment. You’ll work closely with a talented team including a product manager, planner, designer and pattern maker, as well as collaborating with the production team. With your strong passion for product and fashion, you will be essential in creating world‑class products that resonate with our customers.
   

  





*We are currently hiring for both temporary and permanent positions.*




**WHO YOU ARE**




**Qualifications**



* 5+ years of experience from a similar role as Product Developer for garments, shoes or accessories
* Education in Textiles, Buying or Product Development
* Proven track record in creating strong and commercially relevant products, with excellent fashion sense
* A keen eye for current fashion trends and strong fashion intelligence
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Extensive material knowledge
* Driven, structured and proactive in taking initiative
* Strong salesmanship and results‑oriented mindset
* Excellent communication skills
* A collaborative team player with a flexible attitude
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements and efficient solutions



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  

  

  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US​**




 Additional information:
   

  





 We are currently hiring for both temporary and permanent positions with placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including
 **CV in English as soon as possible** 
 . Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  





 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





**​ Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​**

title: Python Developer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Python Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6–24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is backend Python, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., frontend, integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, data flows) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust applications in cloud environments, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a high-trust, high-performing team.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Python Software Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* 5+ years of experience building backends with Python.
* A cloud native background using Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS / GCP / Azure and Terraform - or such.
* Experience from additional languages is also appreciated.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: LIA Fullstack Developer
description:
Hello! Jag heter Maria och jobbar som utvecklare på Wndy. Nu är det dags för oss att sätta ihop höstens intern team och vi letar efter ett par riktigt nyfikna LIA-studenter som vill vara med och bygga produkt tillsammans med oss.
   

  

 Vi är ett tight team som delar en och samma drivkraft: hur kan vi göra Wndy bättre. Hur kan vi lyfta användarupplevelsen? Vad ska vi bygga härnäst och varför? Hos oss är utvecklare med i hela processen, från idé och planering till design, implementation och deploy. Som praktikant kliver du rakt in i teamet och jobbar med riktiga tickets som i slutet av dagen ska nå produktion. Du är alltså inte här för att sitta bredvid och titta på, utan för att vara med och bygga.
   

  

 Vi gillar att testa nya sätt att jobba och just nu utvecklar vi AI-drivet. Vår stack är kort och gott React, TypeScript och Node.js. I vardagen använder vi verktyg som Cursor, Claude, GPT, Lovable och Figma Make osv. Det är viktigt för oss att du är bekant med vår stack och har mött den i dina studier eller egna projekt. Du behöver inte vara expert, men vi söker studenter som är bekväma med både frontend och backend och vill fortsätta utvecklas inom vår stack.
   

  

 Vi söker LIA-studenter till HT 2026. Start är flexibel.
   

  

 Vi tror att du:
   

  

* studerar en utbildning där React, TypeScript och Node.js ingår i kursplanen – eller att du på annat sätt har jobbat med dessa tekniker på studentnivå
* är bekant med både frontend och backend och vill utvecklas vidare som fullstack-utvecklare
* gillar att jobba AI-drivet med verktyg som Cursor, GPT, Claude eller liknande
* vill vara med och bygga features från idé till produktion


 Vi jobbar hybrid men ses minst en gång i veckan på vårt kontor i Gamla stan i Stockholm. Vi ser också gärna att man gör båda sina praktikperioder hos oss, eftersom vi tror att det blir mest givande både för dig och för oss.
   

  

 Känner du peppen och är taggad på att bli vår nästa intern?
   

  

 Skicka CV + en länk till ditt senaste projekt (gärna co-written med valfri AI).
   

  

 Ses snart!!
   

  

 /Maria

title: React Native utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
 Den primära teknikstacken är React Native med type script, Node.js och GCP som hostingmiljö.
   

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 30-03-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**About the role** 




 We are looking for a Fullstack Developer to join our team in Stockholm. You will be working directly with our customers in dynamic and engaging projects. It is a great opportunity for a long term cooperation.
 



  





**About Provide IT** 




 Provide IT is an IT company with a long history. Our team works in a hybrid model from offices in Gothenburg and Stockholm. We focus on two business areas, consulting and digital agency. In consulting, our employees have a great opportunity to work with exciting clients. During these projects they learn a lot by working in diverse teams and on various projects. At the agency, we primarily develop customised websites, systems and applications for our customers. We offer attractive salary and benefits.
 



 Provide IT has a great company culture that is key for our employees. We also do a lot of team building activities.
 



  






 Join us and see for yourself!
 




  





**Requirements** 



* Experience: 6+ years of professional experience in Fullstack Development, with a proven track record of building scalable applications.
* Language: Fluency in Swedish and English (written and spoken) is required for this role.
* Frontend: Extensive experience with Next.js and TypeScript.
* Design Systems: Proven ability to build and maintain UI components within a structured Design System.
* Backend: Strong proficiency in Java and the Spring / Spring Boot ecosystem.
* API Design: Experience building and consuming RESTful services.



  





**Infrastructure & DevOps (Bonus)** 



* Cloud: Hands-on experience with Azure (App Services, Functions, etc.).
* Orchestration: Experience with Kubernetes (deployments, helm charts, or general cluster management).
* CI/CD: Familiarity with automated pipelines and containerization (Docker).
