title: Junior Systemingenjör inom Cybersäkerhet - Sectra Communications
description:
Vill du ha en central roll i att skydda känslig information och skapa säkra kommunikationslösningar som faktiskt gör skillnad? Hos oss på Sectra får du arbeta nära tekniken i en roll med stort ansvar, där din förmåga att se helheten är lika viktig som ditt tekniska djup.
  
  

Sectra Communications utvecklar produkter och tjänster för säker kommunikation och informationssäkerhet inom samhällskritiska verksamheter. Våra lösningar används av kunder med höga krav på tillförlitlighet, tillgänglighet och säkerhet – exempelvis myndigheter, försvar och offentlig sektor.
  
  

På avdelningen Enterprise Mobile Security (EMS) utvecklar vi produkter för säkerhetsnivån Restricted, där vi möjliggör säker hantering av känslig information i mobila och distribuerade miljöer. Vi arbetar bland annat med:
  
  

Sectra VPN-server – en härdad Linux-baserad appliance
  
VPN-klienter för Android, iOS och Windows
  
Mobilsäkerhetsmoduler som gör det möjligt att hantera klassad information på smartphones
  
Säkra kommunikationslösningar
  
  

Här får du jobba i ett kompetent utvecklingsteam med tvärfunktionell bredd och tydligt fokus på teknisk kvalitet och långsiktig säkerhet.
  
  

Rollen
  
  

I rollen som Junior Systemingenjör blir du en teknisk generalist med ansvar för att designa, analysera och vidareutveckla våra lösningar i nära samarbete med utvecklare, testare och säkerhetsspecialister. Du har en överblick över helheten, men är också beredd att gå ner på djupet när det behövs. Du arbetar på ett DevOps-inspirerat sätt, där du är involverad i både utveckling och drift, med fokus på helheten och hela kedjan – från design till leverans och förvaltning. Du kommer bland annat att:
  
  

Arbeta med systemintegration, testmiljöer och automation (CI/CD)
  
Bidra till lösningsdesign och arkitekturstöd i våra utvecklingsprojekt
  
Analysera och validera tekniska komponenter ur ett säkerhets- och prestandaperspektiv
  
Bidra i teknikval och kravanalys
  
Jobba med säkerhetsgranskningar och dokumentation
  
  

Rollen är varierande och kräver både teknisk nyfikenhet, struktur och god kommunikationsförmåga. Du kommer att arbeta i en miljö där säkerhetskrav, teknisk innovation och användbarhet möts – och där du får möjlighet att påverka hela kedjan från idé till leverans.
  
  

Vidare finns möjligheten att jobba med följande teknologier/områden:
  
  

Android
  
Windows
  
Linux
  
Samsung Knox
  
MDM-utveckling (Mobile Device Management)
  
Nätverk & brandväggar
  
CI/CD (t.ex. Jenkins)
  
Virtualiseringsmiljöer (t.ex. Proxmox)
  
Kvalifikationer
  
  

Sectras motto ”Hire for attitude and ability. Train for skill” innebär att vi lägger tyngre vikt i vem du är och din potential än den kunskap och erfarenhet du besitter idag. De egenskaper vi vill se hos våra anställda är viljan och förmågan att lära sig samt att kunna ta sig an nya uppgifter och utmaningar snabbt. Med dessa egenskaper kan vi lära dig det som krävs för tjänsten och för att utveckla dina kunskaper.
  
  

**Utöver detta ser vi att du har:**  

En MSc eller BSc inom datateknik, systemvetenskap eller liknande
  
Kunskap om systemutveckling, systemintegration eller teknisk systemdesign
  
Förståelse för nätverk, protokoll och systemarkitektur
  
En vilja att lära av andra och dela med dig av dina egna kunskaper
  
Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
  
Svenskt medborgarskap (ett krav då vi jobbar med säkerhetsklassad information)
  
  

**Det är meriterande om du har:**  

God kännedom om Linux och/eller andra plattformar som Windows, Android eller iOS
  
Virtualisering eller containerteknik
  
CI/CD och testautomatisering
  
  

Låter det här som något för dig? Tveka inte att höra av dig – vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig!
  
  

Tillsammans kommer vi att driva innovation och leverera enastående produkter till våra kunder.
  
  

Om du har några frågor eller funderingar om tjänsterna, kontakta då vår rekryterare Cajsa Hjortzberg, cajsa.hjortzberg@sectra.com
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Göra skillnad
  
  

Personlig utveckling
  
  

Global miljö
  
  

Grymma kollegor
  
  

Innovation och teknologi
  
  

Kundfokus
  
  

Om företaget
  
  

Sectra develops and sells cutting-edge solutions for medical IT and cybersecurity. We help hospitals and those who are training future healthcare personnel to improve their efficiency so that patients can receive better care. We also support and help defense, authorities, and critical social functions to secure their communication against eavesdropping and protect their systems against unauthorized access. This is how we create conditions for a healthier and safer society.
  
  

One thing that identifies us at Sectra is our customer obsession— our ability and willingness to understand, create value for and stand up for our customers. This shared priority is at the core of our culture. Our customers describe this as having the knowledge to meet expectations, the passion to exceed them. As we hire for attitude and ability - train for skill, we happily expand your knowledge, if you bring the passion and willingness to learn.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

Cajsa Hjortzberg | Kontaktperson

title: DevOps/Infra Engineer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 As a Senior DevOps/Infra Engineer at Coody, you’ll have the opportunity to work with some of the most inspiring digital entertainment companies in the world, in fields such as Gaming, AR/VR, Music, and other forms of interactive media. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, artists, producers, and product managers.
   

  

 You’ll need to be adaptable and ready to hit the ground running in new environments. We see every challenge as an opportunity to grow. Typically, you’ll work on 1-2 assignments per year for companies in industries that you’re passionate about.
   

  

****Who you are****
 We’re looking for talented engineers who loves to build immersive experiences and bring ideas to life. You thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy pushing technical boundaries, and want the freedom to work on exciting projects - without the corporate nonsense.
   

  

* 5+ years of experience in software development or DevOps/Infrastructure engineering.
* Experience from modernization and migration of the entire CI/CD infrastructure
* Proven experience designing, building, and optimizing CI/CD pipelines for C#
* Strong skills using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and Ansible
* A relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Game Development, or similar
* Based in Sweden - You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, or permanent residency
* Be able to work from the clients office in central Stockholm about 3 days per week
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

****How to apply****
 Excited to take the next step in your career and work on meaningful client assignments? Apply now, and we’ll be in touch shortly.

title: Founding Engineer at Vantir | Stockholm
description:
**Who We Are** 




 Vantir is an AI-native consulting and venture-building firm based in Stockholm. We’re a group of passionate engineers and entrepreneurs on a mission to help businesses thrive in the modern age of AI.
 



  





 We’re just getting started, so joining us now means being part of something exciting, helping to build a company from the ground up and shaping its culture, direction, and future.
 



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




 We’re looking for talented AI/data/cloud professionals (engineers, analysts, scientist) and technical management consultants who love solving real-world problems using modern technologies. If you’re ready to work on cutting-edge projects with top-tier clients AND want the rare chance to become a founding member of a company, you’ve come to the right place.
 



  





 In this role, you’ll work closely with clients to design and implement data solutions that help them make smarter decisions. You’ll also help us define how we work and build a company culture that fosters learning, collaboration, and innovation.
 



  





**What’s in It for You?** 



* A rare opportunity to join a newly founded consulting firm and become a Founding Engineer.
* Work directly on high-impact projects with great clients.
* Opportunities to work with our venture-building business
* Be part of a collaborative team where your ideas matter and your work is valued.
* Help shape the technical direction and culture of a growing company.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.



  





**What We’d Love to See in You** 



* Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology
* At least 3 years of experience as a Data Engineer, Platform Engineer, Data Scientist, AI Engineer, Technical Management Consultant or similar.
* Experience working with AWS, GCP or Azure.
* Strong skills in modern software development.
* Experience with tools like Snowflake or dbt (or similar modern data stack tools).
* A knack for creative problem-solving and a passion for using data to drive business decisions.
* You live in or near Stockholm



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 This is more than a job. It’s your chance to be part of something exciting and meaningful - not just for our clients but for our company, too. As a Founding Engineer, you’ll help establish Vantir’s reputation as an innovative data consulting powerhouse, while growing with us every step of the way.
 



  





 Ready to make your mark? Apply today and let’s build something great together.
 



 Learn more about the journey at vantir.se/careers

title: Senior QA Engineer
description:
**Are you quietly using AI to write your test automation faster than anyone else? That’s exactly what we want you to do here.** 
 We are looking for a Senior QA Engineer who isn't just surviving the AI revolution, but wants to lead it. Join the Quinyx Follow-Up team to shape our test strategy, drive React automation, and actually introduce AI-powered QA workflows (Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot) to the rest of the team.
   

  

**🎯 About The Role**
 We are looking for a Senior QA Engineer to join our existing QA engineers and take end-to-end ownership of quality across the Follow-Up product. This is not a "write tests and file bugs" role; you will shape our test strategy, drive automation, introduce AI-powered QA workflows, and mentor the team on modern testing practices.
   

  

 The Follow-Up team builds a full-stack product (Java/Spring Boot + React) at the heart of Quinyx's platform. We ship frequently, care deeply about quality, and are investing in AI-powered engineering workflows to stay at the cutting edge.
   

  

 The team is friendly, supportive, and proactive. We align strongly with Quinyx's core values: passion, trust, collaboration, quality, and innovation. Team members are ready to help each other, share knowledge openly, and take ownership of their work. We value autonomy, and people are trusted to make decisions and drive their areas of responsibility.
   

  

**📝 What You’ll Do**
* Own quality end-to-end across a Java/Spring Boot + React product
* Actively participate in manual testing, test case creation, regression, exploratory, acceptance, and system testing
* Build and maintain automated test suites using Selenium, RestAssured, Appium, and TestNG
* Integrate testing into our CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Docker, K8s, AWS)
* Introduce and champion AI tools (Claude, Gemini, Copilot) for QA workflows — and help the team adopt them
* Expand our performance testing practice using K6
* Collaborate with Staff Engineers and Directors of Engineering on automation strategy
* Mentor QA engineers and developers on testing best practices
* Actively participate in Agile ceremonies and maintain alignment within the broader QA community


**✅ What we’re looking for**
* Proven hands-on QA/test engineering experience
* Strong automation skills with Selenium, RestAssured, Appium, and TestNG
* Comfortable working across the full stack (Java + React)
* Knowledge of performance, load, and stress testing with K6
* Daily AI tool user who can bring AI-assisted workflows to the team
* Excellent English communication skills


 ✨
 **Nice to have (but not required)**
* Proficient with Maven, SQL databases, and TestRail
* Strong foundation in Java or similar OOP languages
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS
* SaaS product background
* Knowledge of the WFM (Workforce Management) domain
* A strong desire to work in highly autonomous, cross-functional teams
* Track record of rolling out AI tools to a team
* A natural mentor who raises the bar for everyone around them


**💡Desired personality traits**
* Proactive and self-driven — takes initiative without waiting to be asked; identifies problems and proposes solutions
* Collaborative — enjoys working closely with developers, product managers, and other QA engineers; not a "silo" worker
* Passionate about quality — genuinely cares about delivering a great product, not just checking boxes
* Open and communicative — shares progress, raises concerns early, contributes constructively in Agile ceremonies
* Patient and supportive as a mentor — willing to invest time in helping others grow, shares knowledge generously
* Curious and adaptable — excited about new tools (especially AI), willing to experiment, and comfortable with change
* Trustworthy and dependable — follows through on commitments, can be relied upon by the team


**💙 Why Quinyx?**
 Quinyx Is a Leading Workforce Management Platform, Helping Businesses Simplify Scheduling, Optimise Staffing, And Engage Their Frontline Teams. We Empower Organisations Across The Globe, Ranging From Retail And Hospitality To Logistics And Healthcare, With Smart, Mobile-first Solutions. Here, You’ll Find
   

  

* A truly international team with colleagues from all over the world
* A flexible and hybrid-friendly work culture
* Opportunities to grow, take ownership, and make a real impact
* An open, inclusive, and fun environment where your ideas matter


**🎁 What we offer**
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid setup with at least 2 days from the office.
* Enhanced vacation allowance, gym membership contribution, health insurance and a pension plan.
* On-market pay.


**📬 How to apply & Our process**
 Ready To Join The Team? Submit Your Application Below, And We’ll Be In Touch As Soon As Possible. We’re Excited To Hear From You! What Our Hiring Process Looks Like
   

  

* Fill out a short application.
* Get invited to complete our psychometric and objective assessments through Alva Labs.
* Screening call with our Talent team.
* Meet the hiring manager.
* Complete a role-specific assessment (technical questions or case).
* Final interview (in-office).
* Offer, references & background checks.


**🙌 Quinyx is an equal opportunity employer**
 We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees - no matter your background, identity, or experience.
   

  

***When work just works!***

title: Scrum Master
description:
**Rollen:**
* Utveckla och stötta teamets agila arbetssätt utifrån Scrum och närliggande metoder.
* Facilitera planering, uppföljning och förbättringsarbete med fokus på helhet och leveransförmåga.
* Arbeta med hinder, beroenden och flöde i samspel med andra team och funktioner.
* Vara en naturlig länk mellan team, produktledning, arkitektur och omgivande organisation.
* Bidra till en kultur präglad av tillit, transparens och kontinuerligt lärande.
* Vidareutveckla hur vi arbetar med agilt ledarskap i en tekniskt avancerad och reglerad miljö.


**Ska-krav:**
* 4-8 års erfarenhet
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet under de senaste 5 åren som ScrumMaster, Agile Coach eller motsvarande roll.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i minst ett uppdrag där agila arbetssätt tillämpats i en organisation med minst tre parallella utvecklingsteam eller motsvarande komplexitet.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet från minst två uppdrag där teamet bestått av flera kompetenser såsom utvecklare, arkitekter, drift/DevOps eller test.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att facilitera agila ceremonier och workshops såsom sprintplanering, retrospektiv eller PI-planering i minst två uppdrag.


**Meriterande:**
* ha erfarenhet med att i rollen som ScrumMaster arbeta i tekniskt avancerade miljöer med arkitektur- och plattformsfrågor.


 Med tekniskt avancerad miljö avses i detta uppdrag en IT miljö där minst två av följande förutsättningar föreligger:
   

  

* Flera parallella utvecklingsteam som arbetar mot gemensam plattform eller arkitektur.
* Plattformskomponenter såsom containerplattform, integrationsplattform eller gemensamma dataplattformar.
* Organisationer där utveckling, drift och säkerhet samverkar i samma leverans.
* Arkitekturfrågor som rör integrationer, API:er, datamodeller eller plattformstjänster.
* Distribuerade system där flera applikationer eller tjänster samverkar.


**Var god förklara hur du uppfyller alla kraven.
   

  

 Omfattning:** 
 100%
   

  

**Ort:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Period** 
 : 21-04-2026-20-04-2027
   

  

**Sista ansökningdag:** 
 02-04-2026
   

  

*Vi presenterar löpande. Om du är intresserad av ett uppdrag rekommenderar vi att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.*

title: Mjukvaruarkitekt/Tech Lead
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Du har erfarenhet av integrationer och eventdriven arkitektur (t.ex. Kafka).
* Du har erfarenhet av retail/POS-system.
* Du har erfarenhet av Molnlösningar och DevOps (CI/CD, monitorering).
* Du har stark kommunikativ och ledande förmåga.
* Du är flytande i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 27-03-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Kafka Developer
description:
**Kafka Developer:** 




  





 For one of our globally leading tech clients we are urgently looking for an experienced Kafka Developer for a long contract based in Stockholm, Sweden.
 



  





 Its paying well and my client can interview asap!
 



  









**Role Summary** 




 We are looking for an Integration Developer with strong hands-on experience in building and operating event-driven integrations using Apache Kafka and Java. The role includes stream processing, JSON transformation, secure communication, and Kubernetes-based deployment and operations.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop and maintain integration services using Apache Kafka and Java
* Build stream processing pipelines using Kafka Streams (stateful processing, joins, windowing)
* Design and implement JSON transformations using Jolt
* Implement secure communication using TLS/mTLS (keystore/truststore management, certificate rotation)
* Integrate authentication and authorization using OIDC
* Deploy and manage services on Kubernetes (configs, secrets, scaling, monitoring, troubleshooting)
* Collaborate with SAP teams and downstream consumers for payload design, performance, and error handling



  





  





**Required Skills** 



* Apache Kafka (producers/consumers, topics, partitions, offsets, retries/error handling)
* Kafka Streams (Java-based stream processing)
* Jolt (JSON transformation specs creation and maintenance)
* Security: TLS/mTLS, keystore/truststore handling
* OIDC fundamentals (token validation and service integration)
* Kubernetes fundamentals (deployments, services, config maps, secrets, scaling)



  





  





 If this is you, then please do not delay in applying!

title: Senior Platform Developers iOS/Android
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Job Description**
* Build shared components: Develop and maintain libraries used across all mobile teams.
* Implement permissions‑based roles: Design and integrate RBAC (role‑based access control) into the platform for secure, seamless rights management in the apps.
* Improve DevEx: Enhance tools, pipelines and workflows to make feature development faster, safer and more efficient.
* Lead architecture standards: Define how data and state should be handled consistently across both Android and iOS.


**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Are a senior developer within your respective platform: Swift, Kotlin or Kotlin Multiplatform.
* Are passionate about Developer Experience and platform architecture.
* Enjoy enabling others by creating the infrastructure and tools they rely on rather than building individual features.


**Application deadline:** 
 30-03-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Manager, front end and advanced development
description:
At Fiskars Group we are unified and driven by our common purpose: pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary. Join our team and seize the extraordinary opportunity to influence the everyday!
   

  

**Fiskars Group**
**Manager, Front-End & Advanced Development – R&D**
**OUR ROLE**
 We are seeking a dynamic
 **Manager, Front-End & Advanced Development** 
 to join our R&D team at Fiskars Group. This is a hands-on technical leadership role focused on transforming crazy ideas into viable solutions for both manual and battery-powered tools.
   

  

**Your mission?** 
 To
 **dream big and make it real** 
 —developing groundbreaking hardware, mechanical and electro-mechanical concepts and technical solutions that redefine functionality and elevate user experience. You will lead early-stage ideation, explore unconventional approaches, and turn bold ideas into tangible prototypes that shape the future of our products.
   

  

 You will manage
 **front-end innovation projects** 
 , coordinating agile sprints and multidisciplinary teams while actively contributing to concept creation and technical problem-solving. Your strong technical background in mechanical engineering, hardware/electronics, or embedded systems, combined with experience in agile development, will enable you to orchestrate innovation and deliver breakthrough solutions.
   

  

**Please note: This role is not a software engineering position** 
 . While embedded systems knowledge is valuable, the core of this role is physical product architecture and hands-on product development.
   

  

 If you thrive in early-stage development, love creating disruptive ideas, and want to shape the future of consumer tools, Fiskars Group is the place for you.
   

  

 This position is based in Espoo, Finland, and reports to our Senior Director, R&D. The role is full-time and hybrid. Candidates based in the EU who are eligible to work in the EU are welcome to apply—relocation support to Finland will be provided where needed.
   

  

**What You’ll Do At Fiskars Group**
**Responsibilities:**
* Lead front-end innovation projects, managing sprints and coordinating multidisciplinary teams using agile practices.
* Act as Scrum Master, facilitating planning, reviews, and retrospectives to keep projects on track.
* Drive ideation and turn bold, unconventional ideas into feasible technical concepts for manual and battery-powered tools.
* Contribute hands-on to mechanical, hardware and system-level development, including prototyping and validating advanced solutions.
* Collaborate with industrial designers, mechanical and electronics engineers, and product managers to merge creativity with technical rigor.
* Ensure alignment with project goals, timelines, and resource planning while fostering an innovative team culture.
* Stay ahead of emerging technologies, materials, and design trends to fuel disruptive innovation.


**Who You Are**
**Experience:**
* MSc/BSc degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics or Embedded Systems.
* Minimum 8+ years of experience in product development with strong technical expertise in one or more areas: mechanical design, hardware/electronics, or embedded systems.
* Proven experience in agile development and working as a Scrum Master.
* Passion for innovation and ability to thrive in a fast-paced, front-end development environment.
* Strong ideation and problem-solving skills and a track record of turning unconventional ideas into successful products.
* Familiarity with CAD tools, prototyping methods, and system-level design principles.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally.


**START YOUR JOURNEY AT FISKARS GROUP**
 We are eagerly awaiting your application. We review applications on a continuous basis, so please submit your CV in English today!
   

  

 For further information please contact: Juha Huhtala, Senior Director, R&D: +358 40 706 2125 or email: juha.huhtala@fiskars.com
   

  

 We are committed to protecting your personal data, so we only accept applications through our career website. Join us and be part of our journey to create value through strong brands, innovative products, and unique design.
   

  

 Apply now and make your mark with Fiskars Group!
   

  

**Last day of application:**
 2026-04-01
   

  

 At Fiskars, we value providing benefits that matter to you and cater to our diverse global workforce, no matter where you are in the world. While benefits may vary based on location, here are some of the incredible offerings you can expect when joining our team:
   

  

**Competitive Compensation:** 
 We ensure that our employees are fairly compensated based on industry standards and local market factors.
   

  

**Health and Wellness:** 
 Your well-being matters to us, no matter where you are. We offer various health and well-being focused programs and coverage, adapted to the requirements of each region.
   

  

**Work-Life Balance:** 
 We understand the need for balance in your life. Our paid time off plans and flexible work arrangements and policies are designed to accommodate local customs and personal commitments, enabling you to thrive in both your professional and personal life.
   

  

**Professional Development:** 
 We believe in nurturing talent and supporting professional growth. Through training programs, skill development initiatives and learning resources, we empower our employees to reach their full potential.
   

  

**Inclusive and Diverse Environment:** 
 We value diversity and promote inclusivity. Join a workplace where your unique background and perspectives are celebrated, fostering collaboration and respect across all our markets.
   

  

**Recognition and Rewards:** 
 We believe in celebrating and recognizing the contributions of our employees worldwide. Our recognition programs are designed to acknowledge exceptional performance and achievements, ensuring that your efforts are celebrated and valued.
   

  

**Vested Interest:** 
 Through our Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP), you have the opportunity to invest in Fiskars Group and become a proud co-owner, sharing in the success and growth of the company.
   

  

**Employee Discounts:** 
 We want to ensure our team members make each day the extraordinary with use of our products and offer product discounts across our brands.
   

  

*Please note that specific benefits may vary based on local regulations, market conditions, and other factors. We are committed to providing competitive and meaningful benefits to our employees in every market we operate.*
***Pioneering design to make the everyday extraordinary***
*Fiskars Group (FSKRS, Nasdaq Helsinki) is the global home of design-driven brands for indoor and outdoor living. Since 1649, we have designed products of timeless, purposeful, and functional beauty, while driving innovation and sustainable growth. In 2024, Fiskars Group’s global net sales were EUR 1.2 billion and we had close to 7,000 employees. We have two Business Areas (BA), Vita and Fiskars.*
*BA Vita offers premium and luxury products for the tableware, drinkware, jewelry and interior categories. Its well-known brands include Georg Jensen, Royal Copenhagen, Wedgwood, Moomin Arabia, Iittala and Waterford. In 2024, BA Vita’s reported net sales were EUR 605 million. Already 50% of BA Vita’s net sales comes from direct-to-consumer sales, comprising approximately 500 stores and approximately 60 e-commerce sites.*
*BA Fiskars consists of the gardening and outdoor categories, in addition to the scissors and creating, as well as cooking categories. The brands include Fiskars and Gerber. In 2024, BA Fiskars’ net sales were EUR 547 million.*
*Read more: fiskarsgroup.com*
 OBR1

title: Senior PostgreSQL Database Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are seeking a Senior Database Engineer with strong expertise in PostgreSQL and MongoDB to join a high-performing Data Foundation team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing and optimizing application databases in a cloud-based environment, ensuring performance, scalability, and reliability.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Manage and maintain PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Oracle databases in a cloud environment (AWS)
* Perform database administration tasks, including monitoring, tuning, backup, and recovery
* Handle capacity planning, performance optimization, and database consolidation
* Collaborate with development teams to support SQL development, enhancements, and runtime activities
* Provide technical guidance to project teams on database design and best practices
* Work closely with architects to design and implement scalable database solutions
* Contribute to automation, stability, security, and quality improvements
* Support CI/CD practices and continuous improvement initiatives
* Participate in on-call support rotations when required


**Requirements:**
* Minimum 3+ years of hands-on experience managing PostgreSQL and MongoDB in production environments
* Strong experience working with AWS cloud services
* Advanced proficiency in SQL and relational database concepts
* Experience in query optimization and performance tuning
* Proven ability to work independently and drive technical initiatives
* Experience managing large-scale database environments and implementing changes
* Experience with Oracle databases
* Knowledge of monitoring tools beyond CloudWatch
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
* Background in database development
* Experience with automation and scripting
* Fluent in English (written and spoken)
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Proactive and self-driven mindset
* Collaborative team player with a “can-do” attitude
* Passion for technology and continuous learning


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Senior Agil Coach
description:
Vi söker en erfaren Senior Agil Coach till ett långsiktigt uppdrag hos en organisation inom samhällskritisk finansiell infrastruktur. Uppdraget är en del av en omfattande transformation där fokus ligger på att utveckla framtidens betalningslösningar. Du blir en nyckelperson i att stärka den agila förmågan i organisationen och bidra till en modern, värdeströmsbaserad utvecklingsmodell.
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning / arbetsuppgifter**
* Stötta och samarbeta med interna intressenter i frågor kopplade till agil utveckling
* Facilitera och leda agila ceremonier, workshops och förändringsinitiativ
* Bygga och vidareutveckla organisationens agila utvecklingsförmåga
* Coacha chefer, ledare och team i implementation och vidareutveckling av agila arbetssätt och mindset
* Bidra aktivt i ett team av agila coacher och driva den övergripande transformationen framåt
* Arbeta nära både utvecklings- och operationsfunktioner för att säkerställa ett effektivt flöde (DevOps-perspektiv)


**Skallkrav**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet i rollen som Agil Coach eller liknande
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av förändringsledning och organisationsutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att leda agila transformationer från traditionella styrmodeller till värdeströmsorganisationer
* Stark förståelse för systemutveckling samt operations/DevOps
* Erfarenhet av arbete i projektorganisationer
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning
* Mycket god kommunikativ och pedagogisk förmåga


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet från flera olika branscher och organisationsformer
* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor, produktbolag eller större beställarorganisationer
* Erfarenhet av att bygga upp eller vidareutveckla interna agila ramverk/modeller


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Stark ledarförmåga och förmåga att inspirera och engagera
* Holistiskt synsätt på organisationsutveckling
* Pragmatisk med god förmåga att se helheten
* Analytisk och förändringsdrivande
* Relationsskapande och förtroendeingivande i komplexa miljöer
* Lyhörd lagspelare med god samarbetsförmåga


**Start, Slut, Omfattning Och Plats**
* Start: Så snart som möjligt eller enligt överenskommelse
* Slut: 2026-12-31 (med option på förlängning)
* Omfattning: 100%
* Plats: Stockholm

title: Testledare inom medicinteknik
description:
**Var med och gör verklig skillnad tillsammans med Ortivus!** 




 Ortivus är ett svenskt bolag som specialiserar sig på medicinteknik och e-hälsolösningar, främst för ambulansverksamhet och akutsjukvård. Ortivus produkter och tjänster förbättrar effektiviteten och kvaliteten genom teknik för övervakning, beslutsstöd och kommunikation och räddar därmed livsviktiga sekunder i kritiska situationer.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som testledare på Ortivus får du ett övergripande ansvar för testarbetet för deras medicinska produkter som framför allt är mjukvarubaserade, du blir både drivande i det dagliga testarbetet och ansvarig för att sätta riktningen framåt.
 



  





 I det dagliga arbetet ingår att ta fram testplaner, genomföra tester och skapa testrapporter. Du planerar och leder teamets testaktiviteter, men får också stor frihet att forma teststrategin inklusive tillhörande processer samt implementera automatiserade testlösningar från grunden. Här är du den som driver både tekniska val och långsiktig kvalitetssäkring.
 



  





 Här blir du en nyckelperson i ett tvärfunktionellt team bestående av R&D, kvalitet, regulatoriska funktioner och klinisk expertis. Du kommer att utveckla och underhålla teststrategier i enlighet med deras kvalitetsledningssystem (QMS), som uppfyller MDR med utgångspunkt i medicintekniska standarder som IEC 62304 och ISO 13485.
 



  





**Det här kommer du att göra:** 



* Utveckla och underhålla teststrategin för hela produkten i enlighet med vårt kvalitetsledningssystem
* Leda, genomföra och rapportera testaktiviteter för medicinska mjukvaruprodukter
* Bygga upp testautomatisering från grunden och driva tekniska val kring verktyg och ramverk
* Driva arbete med testautomatisering och validering
* Säkerställa spårbarhet från krav till testfall och verifieringsresultat
* Delta i riskanalyser, designgranskningar och revisioner
* Vara mentor för QA-ingenjörer samt övriga i teamet och bidra till en kultur av kvalitet och ständiga förbättringar
* Ansvara för frekvent releasehantering av vår huvudprodukt.



  





**Om dig** 




 Vi söker dig som vill ta ett helhetsansvar över testprocessen i en miljö där kvalitet verkligen gör skillnad!
 



  





 Du är en driven person som gärna tar initiativ och vågar driva förändring. Du har lätt för att sätta dig in i nya områden, tänker strategiskt men trivs också med att vara hands-on. Med god samarbetsförmåga och tydlig kommunikation rör du dig smidigt mellan olika roller och kompetenser.
 



  





**För att lyckas i rollen som testledare ser vi gärna att du:** 



* Kandidatexamen eller magisterexamen i datavetenskap eller liknande område
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av mjukvarutestning, varav minst 2 år i en ledande roll
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av testning av medicinsk eller annan säkerhetskritisk mjukvara
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps samt testhanteringsverktyg
* Erfarenhet av automatiserade testmiljöer och skriptspråk
* Utmärkta färdigheter i kommunikation (svenska och engelska), dokumentation och ledarskap



  





**Meriterande kompetenser:** 



* God kunskap om MDR och regulatoriska standarder (IEC 62304, ISO 14971, ISO 13485)



  





**Mer om Ortivus** 




 Ortivus grundades 1986 och är specialiserat på att utveckla och kommersialisera
 **MobiMed** 
 , en innovativ portfölj av e-hälso- och medicintekniska lösningar som ökar säkerheten och effektiviteten inom prehospital vård, globalt.
 



  





 MobiMed är en modulär plattform som möjliggör realtidsdelning av information genom hela vårdkedjan, från larmcentral till akutsjukvård. Det integrerade systemet räddar livsviktiga sekunder och ger vårdpersonal bättre beslutsunderlag i kritiska situationer. MobiMed effektiviserar vårdleveransen och minskar kostnader, något som är extra viktigt i tider av ekonomiska utmaningar och snävare budgetar.
 



  





***Ortivus samarbetar tillsammans med Safemind i denna rekryteringsprocess.***

title: Qlikutvecklare 2
description:
**Bygg framtidens teknik med Professional Galaxy AB**
 Bli en del av ett nätverk av talangfulla ingenjörer, utvecklare, molnspecialister och AI-innovators som arbetar med betydelsefulla projekt över hela Sverige och Europa. På
 **Professional Galaxy AB** 
 kopplar vi samman de främsta tekniktalangerna med spännande projekt inom områden som molnlösningar, programvaruteknik, data, cybersäkerhet och artificiell intelligens.
   

  

 Utforska spännande möjligheter och utveckla din karriär genom att arbeta med banbrytande teknologier och framåtblickande team.
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 Syftet med uppdraget är att säkerställa kontinuerlig utveckling och underhåll av Qlik Sense-applikationer för verksamhetens analysbehov. Genom att tillhandahålla kompetens för både driftnära utveckling och planerade förbättringar, ska organisationen kunna upprätthålla kvalitet, effektivitet och flexibilitet i datavisualisering och beslutsstöd.
   

  

**Resursen ska:**
* Utveckla och underhålla Qlik Sense-applikationer, inklusive visualiseringar och rapportering.
* Hantera driftnära utveckling och löpande förbättringar.
* Stötta organisationen i dess analysbehov, både planerade och ad hoc.
* Vidareutveckla befintliga Qlik Sense-lösningar för att möta verksamhetens förändrade behov.


 Målet är att säkerställa en stabil, flexibel och anpassningsbar Qlik Sense-miljö som stödjer både operativ och strategisk uppföljning.
   

  

**Ska-krav**
* Kompetensnivå 4 (9–12 år).
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av utveckling i Qlik Sense.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av dimensionsmodellering och ETL-utveckling.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av SQL för att verifiera rapporter.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av felsökning och support av befintliga Qlik-applikationer.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av versionshanteringsverktyg såsom Platform Manager.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av kravframställan för arkitektur, datamodellering och Qlik-applikationer.
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift.


**Bör-krav**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av ekonomisk utveckling.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av utveckling av Qlik-applikationer mot ärende- och beslutshantering.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av kravställan mellan datalager och Qlik-applikation.
* Kunskap om plattformar, miljöer, konfigureringar och skalbarhet för Qlik.
* Förståelse för presentationslager, användarvänlighet och GUI-uppbyggnad.


**Startdatum** 
 :
 **2026-04-20**
**Slutdatum** 
 :
 **2027-04-19**
**Ansökan**
 Är du rätt person för uppdraget eller vill rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Vänligen ansök direkt via vårt system med:
   

  

* Ditt uppdaterade CV.
* Tillgänglighet för att påbörja uppdraget.
* Motivering varför du är lämplig – hänvisa till tidigare uppdrag, utbildning och personliga egenskaper.'


**Observera** 
 : Vi på Professional Galaxy AB tar inte emot ansökningar via e-post. Alla ansökningar måste skickas via portalen för att vara giltiga.
   

  

**Löpande urval** 
 : Notera att vi för denna roll tillämpar löpande urval. Det innebär att vi ibland tar bort uppdragen före sista ansökningsdag. Om du är intresserad rekommenderar vi att du ansöker omedelbart.

title: Senior Real Time 3D Developer (Unreal / Unity)
description:
Ready for something different? Are you an experienced and passionate developer looking for the next challenge in your career? Piktiv is on a mission to help our clients leverage game technology even more than is being done today. We are looking for the right people to join our team and bring this vision to life. If you would like to combine the benefits of working as a consultant with the benefits of working in a product company, we at Piktiv would like to hear from you!
   

  

**Who We Are**
 We are a progressive consultancy company that provides smart solutions for our clients. Our work spans from heavy industry systems, healthcare applications, retail and fintech systems, to computer games. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and our ability to turn complex challenges into streamlined solutions.
   

  

 What sets us apart is that Piktiv brings in client projects to work on in-house by providing highly skilled fullstack teams instead of individual consultants. We are currently looking to expand our team with developers who have experience working with modern game engines to help us deliver solutions for our clients across multiple industries.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You have several years of experience in software development and a strong background working with modern game engines such as Unreal Engine or Unity. You enjoy solving complex problems and building robust systems.
   

  

 You are both technically strong and pragmatic in how you approach solutions. You are comfortable taking ownership of technical decisions and leading development efforts when needed.
   

  

 You communicate clearly with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders and enjoy collaborating with multidisciplinary teams. Experience working with industrial companies is a strong plus.
   

  

 You seek an engaging work environment that allows you to work with challenging technical problems, a high degree of personal freedom and responsibility.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As part of our team, you will work on projects that leverage game engines to solve complex challenges for our clients.
   

  

 Responsibilities include:
   

  

* Designing and developing applications using game engines such as Unreal Engine or Unity
* Building real‑time 3D applications such as simulations, visualization tools, digital twins, and other interactive systems
* Collaborating with designers, engineers, and client stakeholders to deliver high‑quality solutions
* Taking a leading role in projects where game technology is a core component
* Contributing to architectural decisions and ensuring scalable, maintainable implementations
* Helping drive projects forward from concept through delivery


**Qualifications**
* Several years of professional software development experience
* Strong experience with Unreal Engine or Unity
* Professional proficiency in English


**Desirable Skills**
* Experience building simulation systems, digital twins, or visualization tools
* Experience working within manufacturing or automotive industries


**What We Offer**
 At Piktiv, we believe in the importance of open communication and creating a collaborative workplace where each individual can thrive. We work hard to cultivate a culture of support and learning with an emphasis on a healthy work-life balance. We offer a competitive salary as well as several perks and benefits. Rather than offer a standardized plan across the company, we like to tailor our offer to your personal preferences in person. The position is full-time, 40 hours per week.

title: System Architect – Infrastructure & Tooling Team Lead
company: Technology Nexus Secured Business Solutions AB
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY
  
A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
  
Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
  
  

ABOUT THE ROLE
  
As System Architect, you will act as the technical lead for the Infrastructure & Tooling team in day-to-day operational matters while also owning the architectural direction of our SaaS service platforms.
  
You will work at the intersection of operations and architecture — ensuring stability and performance today, while designing scalable, secure, and automated platforms for tomorrow.
  
This role requires deep technical expertise, strong leadership capabilities, and the ability to balance operational excellence with long-term architectural thinking.
  
  

MAIN RESPONSABILITIES
  
* Act as team lead for operational, day-to-day infrastructure topics and staffing related tasks.
* Define and evolve the architecture of our SaaS service platforms based on the IT OPS guidelines
* Drive infrastructure automation and Infrastructure-as-Code initiatives
* Ensure high availability, scalability, and security across our platforms
* Design and maintain Linux-based environments (primarily RHEL-based distributions)
* Collaborate with development, security, and product teams to align platform capabilities with business needs
* Contribute to continuous improvement of operational processes, reliability, and resilience
* Support strategic decisions regarding infrastructure technologies and roadmap


ABOUT YOU
  
  

Very strong proficiency in Ansible and Terraform
  
  

Solid experience with OpenStack (or similar private cloud platforms)
  
  

Advanced knowledge of Linux environments (RHEL-based)
  
  

**Strong understanding of:**  

* Server infrastructure
* Storage solutions
* Networking
* Hardware Security Modules (HSMs)


Experience designing and operating production-grade SaaS infrastructure
  
  

Prior experience managing a team
  
  

Comfortable working in security-sensitive and compliance-driven environments
  
  

Professional proficiency in Swedish and English
  
  

Nice-to-Have
  
  

Experience from regulated industries (eID, PKI, digital identity, financial services, public sector)
  
  

Experience with high-availability architectures and geo-redundant designs
  
  

Experience leading or mentoring other engineers
  
  

Personal Qualities
  
  

A natural technical leader who enjoys guiding others in operational excellence
  
  

Structured and analytical, with strong problem-solving skills
  
  

Comfortable taking ownership of both daily operations and long-term strategy
  
  

Passionate about automation, security, and resilient system design
  
  

A team player who communicates clearly and collaborates across functions
  
  

Background check
  
Transparency, security, and trust are the core of our company; therefore, the final candidate will be subjected to a background check as a mandatory step in the recruitment process.
  
  

Öppen för alla
  
Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.

title: Sr. PS Project Manager
description:
locations
Sweden
time type
Full time
posted on
Posted Today
job requisition id
JR110337
Genesys empowers organizations of all sizes to improve loyalty and business outcomes by creating the best experiences for their customers and employees. Through Genesys Cloud, the AI-powered Experience Orchestration platform, organizations can accelerate growth by delivering empathetic, personalized experiences at scale to drive customer loyalty, workforce engagement, efficiency and operational improvements.
We employ more than 6,000 people across the globe who embrace empathy and cultivate collaboration to succeed. And, while we offer great benefits and perks like larger tech companies, our employees have the independence to make a larger impact on the company and take ownership of their work. Join the team and create the future of customer experience together.**The Sr. Project Manager, Professional Services for EMEA, is a vital member of the local account team as she/he manages the day-to-day operations of key customer projects with responsibility for tracking project status and profitability, coordinating project resources, managing client expectations, and leveraging project experience throughout the team. Primary interface with the customer to manage the triple constraints (schedule, scope, budget) and to help resolve issues. Understands the client's business very well and establishes inroads into the organisation of the account to increase Genesys visibility. Responsible for all Genesys personnel incl. sub contractors working on the project. Manages all financial aspects of the projects including forecasting and revenue recognition.****Is able to build on the foundations of the delivery, and drive Value Realisation from existing or new developments and channel** **Core to our vision around Experience as a Service is building Trust and Empathy with our customers and partner ecosystem and as Project lead, you will be in the forefront.** **The primary responsibilities for this role include (but are not limited to):*** **Provide project management of key, large & complex solution engagements, with a value of Services from $50k upwards to projects with total value in excess of $3m, including customer sign off.**
* **Manage all aspects of the project delivery including project schedule, risk management and risk mitigation plan, scope documentation, scheduling resources, setting goals and priorities, reporting project status, tracking and resolving issues and customer acceptance.**
* **Implement change management process on engagements.**
* **Follow standard PS Operational processes and guidelines.**
* **Ensure engagements are on time and on budget.**
* **Achieve customer satisfaction goals.**
* **Maintain close links with other functions in Professional Services and other Company departments especially Sales, Pre-Sales and Marketing, Support, and Education.**
* **Maintain quality relationships between our clients, strategic partners and/or third party providers.**
* **Generate incremental license and services revenue through direct customer contact.**
* **Achieve profitability goals by providing high-quality, innovative solutions and efficient delivery services.**
* **Proven track record in driving customer relationships, and exceeding customer expectations.**

 **Minimum Requirements:*** **5+ years relevant experience in the IT industry ideally in the Contact Centre, Telecommunication and/or CRM market.**
* **Proven IT Project Management experience, including budgeting, of complex solutions.**
* **University degree in Engineering, Economics, Management or equivalent.**
* **Understands at least 1 industry segment (e.g. Telecommunications) and has an understanding of computer architecture, open systems products (hardware and software), project management tools and methodologies, customer and Professional Services.**
* **Full understanding of Contact Centre Market and the Cloud enablement we play in**
* **Ability to take the initiative, trouble-shoot, build relationships, develop a team, solicit/gain support inside and outside of Professional Services.**
* **Ability to work unsupervised and in a proactive manner.**
* **Proven ability to work under pressure both within a team and on your own.**
* **Excellent presentation skills.**
* **Very good verbal and written skills in English and Swedish + ideally other languages.**
* **Computer literate in the use of MSOffice, MS Project or similar, word processing, spreadsheet, presentation and project control tools.**
* **Willing to travel extensively throughout UK and Europe, as restrictions allow.**
* **Full clean driving license.**

 **Desirable Skills:*** **Project Management Certification, e.g. Prince2, PMI.**
* **Certified Genesys Engineer 7.x +**
* **Exposure to Genesys technical solutions. Will have had exposure to the Genesys product suite to a level that you are able to discuss simple solutions.**

 **About Us:** **Genesys® powers more than 25 billion of the world’s best customer experiences each year. We put the customer at the center of everything we do and passionately believe that great customer engagement drives great business outcomes. More than 10,000 companies in more than 100 countries trust the industry’s #1 customer experience platform to orchestrate omnichannel customer journeys that eliminate silos and build lasting relationships. With a strong track record of innovation and a never-ending desire to be first, Genesys is the only company recognized by top industry analysts as a leader in both cloud and on-premise customer engagement solutions. Connect with Genesys via** **http://www.genesys.com/,** **Twitter, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, and the Genesys blog.** **Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, disability, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.#**
If a Genesys employee referred you, please use the link they sent you to apply.**About Genesys:**
Genesys® empowers more than 8,000 organizations worldwide to create the best customer and employee experiences. With agentic AI at its core, Genesys Cloud™ is the AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform that connects people, systems, data and AI across the enterprise. As a result, organizations can drive customer loyalty, growth and retention while increasing operational efficiency and teamwork across human and AI workforces. To learn more, visit www.genesys.com.**Reasonable Accommodations:**
If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in your ability to access or use this online application and need an alternative method for applying, you or someone you know may contact us at reasonable.accommodations@genesys.com.
You can expect a response within 24–48 hours. To help us provide the best support, click the email link above to open a pre-filled message and complete the requested information before sending. If you have any questions, please include them in your email.
This email is intended to support job seekers requesting accommodations. Messages unrelated to accommodation—such as application follow-ups or resume submissions—may not receive a response.**Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to fairness in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or** **expression, marital** **status, domestic partner** **status, national** **origin, genetics,** **disability, military** **and veteran status, and other protected characteristics.***Please note that recruiters will never ask for sensitive personal or financial information during the application phase.*
